xsl:stylesheet.xsl:variable: |kolor|kolor akcesoriأ³w|kolor cawأ¶|kolor elegante|kolor estella|kolor fleuresse|kolor formesse|kolor graccioza|kolor janine|kolor joop!|kolor koca eskimo|kolor koca ibena|kolor mأ¶ve|kolor przeإ›cieradإ‚a formesse|kolor rhomtuft|kolor roberto cavalli|kolor rؤ™cznika bugatti|kolor s.oliver|kolor villeroy & bosch|kolor vossen|

|materiaإ‚|materiaإ‚ (dywaniki do filtrأ³w)|materiaإ‚ (rؤ™cznik do filtrأ³w)|materiaإ‚ (koce do filtrأ³w)|skإ‚ad|skإ‚ad dywanika|skإ‚ad dywanu|skإ‚ad koca|skإ‚ad narzuty|skإ‚ad ochraniacza na materac|skإ‚ad poduszki / poszewki|skإ‚ad poszewki|skإ‚ad poإ›cieli|skإ‚ad przeإ›cieradإ‚a|skإ‚ad rؤ™cznika|skإ‚ad spأ³dnicy|skإ‚ad szlafroka|

xsl:when.test: (../../@producer_code_standard = 'ISBN10' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'ISBN13' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN8' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN13' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN14' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN12' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'UPCE') and @code_producer!=''

translate($cleanedToken,$lowerLetters,'') != '' and string-length(translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')) > 0 and (translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='ml' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='l' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='g' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='kg' )
$cat_id = '7282' or $cat_id = '7283' or $cat_id = '7287' or $cat_id = '7288' or $cat_id = '7308' or $cat_id = '7315' or $cat_id = '7317' or $cat_id = '7320'
$cat_id = '1312' or $cat_id = '6482' or $cat_id = '6484' or $cat_id = '7031' or $cat_id = '7033' or $cat_id = '7039' or $cat_id = '7040'
$cat_id = '6216' or $cat_id = '6367' or $cat_id = '7157' or $cat_id = '7159' or $cat_id = '7160' or $cat_id = '7199' or $cat_id = '7235' or $cat_id = '7248' or $cat_id = '7250'
